name: flint
description: AI task orchestration layer for VS Code.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @flint/core-types && npm run build --workspace @flint/storage && npm run build --workspace @flint/scheduler && npm run build --workspace @flint/judge && npm run build --workspace @flint/providers && npm run build --workspace @flint/workspace-tools && npm run build --workspace @flint/orchestrator && npm run build --workspace @flint/ui-tokens && npm run build --workspace flint-vscode
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @flint/storage && npm run test --workspace @flint/scheduler && npm run test --workspace @flint/providers && npm run test --workspace @flint/judge && npm run test --workspace @flint/workspace-tools && npm run test --workspace @flint/orchestrator
